title: BEM-867 classify compare
objective:
Run script:
"""
files = {
    'b866_result': Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem867_compare_bem866_result.md'),
    'b866_mailbox': Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem867_compare_bem866_mailbox.md'),
    'b867_queue': Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem867_compare_bem867_queue.md'),
    'b867_result': Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem867_compare_bem867_result.md'),
    'b867_mailbox': Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem867_compare_bem867_mailbox.md'),
}
texts = {k: (p.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if p.exists() else '') for k,p in files.items()}
if 'CLAUDE_WRITE_OK' in texts['b866_mailbox'] and 'workflow' in texts['b867_queue'] and 'PENDING_INTERNAL_AUDITOR_RESPONSE' in texts['b867_mailbox'] and 'Exists: False' in texts['b867_result']:
    status = 'B866_OK_B867_QUEUE_NOT_PROCESSED'
elif 'DISPATCH_FAILED' in texts['b867_result']:
    status = 'B867_DISPATCH_FAILED'
elif 'APPROVED_WITH_NOTES' in texts['b867_mailbox'] or 'BLOCKED_WITH_REASON' in texts['b867_mailbox']:
    status = 'B867_MAILBOX_HAS_FINAL'
else:
    status = 'UNCLEAR'
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM867_COMPARE_CLASSIFICATION_' + status + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-867 compare classification\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nB866 mailbox contains CLAUDE_WRITE_OK: ' + str('CLAUDE_WRITE_OK' in texts['b866_mailbox']) + '\nB867 queue has workflow: ' + str('workflow' in texts['b867_queue']) + '\nB867 result missing marker: ' + str('Exists: False' in texts['b867_result']) + '\nB867 mailbox pending: ' + str('PENDING_INTERNAL_AUDITOR_RESPONSE' in texts['b867_mailbox']) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('BEM867 compare classification: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
